content: Search Test Document for RAG System This is a simple test document to verify that the RAG search functionality is working correctly. Key features being tested: - Document upload and processing - Chunk generation and indexing - Semantic similarity search - Embedding generation and matching The system should be able to find this document when searching for terms like 'search test', 'RAG system', or 'document processing'.
